question: The chart shows time allocation on a typical day. Which of the following statements about the time spent in different activities is correct?

options.A: Work takes more time than Leisure and Chores combined.
options.B: Leisure and Chores together account for a larger share of time than Work.
options.C: Commute takes as much time as Leisure.
options.D: Commute and Chores together take more time than Leisure.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Work: 55%; Leisure: 20%; Chores: 15%; Commute: 10%.
